title: cassia javanica subsp. bartonii
intro: Cassia javanica subsp. bartonii, also known as the Javan cassia or Australian senna, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Cassia javanica subsp. bartonii include its ability to treat constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Cassia javanica subsp. bartonii can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tablets, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
